html:
Exclusive to:  

The Cutlass Supreme is a craftable Weapon introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires a dead Swordfish, two Gold Nuggets and a Twig to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Cutlass Supreme deals 68 damage on hit, the same amount of damage as the Dark Sword, minus the sanity drain, and has 150 uses, making it more durable. It deals an additional 34 damage against Sealnado.


Hamlet

The Cutlass Surpreme is also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, it cannot be crafted. Instead, it can be bought for 50 Oincs at The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop in the Pig City.

Trivia

  • The Cutlass Supreme shares its name with an Oldsmobile model.
  • Across all DLCs, The Cutlass Supreme deals the highest melee damage tied for the first place with the Dark Sword among all Weapons for the base damage. Within the singleplayer game, only three melee weapons situationally do more damage: the Morning Star when used on wet Mobs, the Obsidian Spear (starts out at 51 but charges up to 102), and the Trident when used while on a Boat.
  • The Cutlass Supreme's crafting description is a reversed reference to the common message seen in ads, or short films involving animals, to ensure that the animals weren't treated cruelly.
  • The noise made by the Cutlass Supreme when striking a Mob is the same noise that is made when a Swordfish attacks.
  • It is one of the only melee weapons with a special attack noise, the others being the Dark Sword, the Halberd, the Tail o' Three Cats, and the Alarming Clock.

Gallery

  • WX-78 holding a Cutlass Surpreme.
  • Warly holding a Cutlass Supreme on a Boat during night.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

The Cutlass Supreme is a craftable Weapon introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires a dead Swordfish, two Gold Nuggets and a Twig to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Cutlass Supreme deals 68 damage on hit, the same amount of damage as the Dark Sword, minus the sanity drain, and has 150 uses, making it more durable. It deals an additional 34 damage against Sealnado.

The Cutlass Surpreme is also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, it cannot be crafted. Instead, it can be bought for 50 Oincs at The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop in the Pig City.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Cutlass Supreme shares its name with an Oldsmobile model.
Across all DLCs, The Cutlass Supreme deals the highest melee damage tied for the first place with the Dark Sword among all Weapons for the base damage. Within the singleplayer game, only three melee weapons situationally do more damage: the Morning Star when used on wet Mobs, the Obsidian Spear (starts out at 51 but charges up to 102), and the Trident when used while on a Boat.
The Cutlass Supreme's crafting description is a reversed reference to the common message seen in ads, or short films involving animals, to ensure that the animals weren't treated cruelly.
The noise made by the Cutlass Supreme when striking a Mob is the same noise that is made when a Swordfish attacks.
It is one of the only melee weapons with a special attack noise, the others being the Dark Sword, the Halberd, the Tail o' Three Cats, and the Alarming Clock.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dao Cắt Tối Thượng là một Vũ Khí chế tạo được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó yêu cầu một Cá Kiếm chết, hai Thỏi Vàng và một Cành Cây để chế tạo và một Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Cutlass Supreme gây 68 sát thương khi đánh, lượng sát thương tương đương với Dark Sword, trừ đi khả năng tiêu hao tinh thần và có 150 lần sử dụng, khiến nó bền hơn. Nó gây thêm 34 sát thương lên Sealnado.

The '''Cutlass Supreme''' is a craftable [[Weapon]] introduced in the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It requires a dead [[Swordfish]], two [[Gold Nugget]]s and a [[Twig]] to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. A Cutlass Supreme deals 68 damage on hit, the same amount of damage as the [[Dark Sword]], minus the sanity drain, and has 150 uses, making it more durable. It deals an additional 34 damage against [[Sealnado]].
__NOTOC__

=={{Pic|32|Hamlet icon}} Hamlet==
The Cutlass Surpreme is also included in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, however, it cannot be crafted. Instead, it can be bought for 50 [[Oinc]]s at [[The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop]] in the [[Pig City]].

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Cutlass Supreme shares its name with an [[wikipedia:Oldsmobile_Cutlass_Supreme|Oldsmobile]] model.
* Across all DLCs, The Cutlass Supreme deals the highest melee damage tied for the first place with the [[Dark Sword]] among all [[Weapon]]s for the base damage. Within the singleplayer game, only three melee weapons situationally do more damage: the [[Morning Star]] when used on wet [[Mobs]], the [[Obsidian Spear]] (starts out at 51 but charges up to 102), and the [[Trident]] when used while on a [[Boats|Boat]].
* The Cutlass Supreme's crafting description is a reversed reference to the common message seen in ads, or short films involving animals, to ensure that the animals weren't treated cruelly.
* The noise made by the Cutlass Supreme when striking a Mob is the same noise that is made when a Swordfish attacks.
* It is one of the only melee weapons with a special attack noise, the others being the Dark Sword, the [[Halberd]], the [[Tail o' Three Cats]], and the [[Alarming Clock]].
